bestVideos.title: Massive School of Fish on Reef Wall

trips.name: Roatan
trips.region: West End, Roatan, Bay Islands, Honduras

trips.name: Grand Cayman
trips.region: Seven Mile Beach / West Wall, Grand Cayman

dives.notes: Same turtle 4 times. Frogfish walk not swim
Crazy current pulled us multiple km
Parents almost swam into trigger fish
Turtle grove/turtle city. Super healthy reef
Awesome reef that shot up in deep water
Got separated in current watching manta ray
Super fast current through channel. Guide ran out of air
Feeding mantas, campfire of lights. Amazing dive
Guide was awesome at finding octopus
Strong surge, blew through air fighting current
Great relaxing morning dive. Better mask
Strong current, very cool rock formations
Garbage floating in first 5m. Short dive
Best dive of trip. Strong current
Encased in minnows, tons of divers

highlights: schooling fish chased by larger fish

dives.notes: Biggest turtle and clam ever seen. 30m vis
Massive school of fish at end
Best dive to date! Underwater pinnacle
Amazing top reef, thousands of little fish
2 mantas circling, 2 more joined. Amazing dive!
Really cool dive — barracudas swimming around man-made coral houses like an underwater village. Massive eels, turtle, pipefish, big pufferfish.
Large cuttlefish, two eels fighting, mantis shrimp. Struggled with ears from start.
Gentle drift dive. Stingray, turtle, bumphead parrotfish, lots of fish around top reef.
Explored large underwater cave entrance, swam along steep wall with soft corals. Barracudas, big turtle at end. Current pulled towards Barracuda Point.
Large school of jackfish at start, steep wall drop, very cool white scorpionfish, sharks underneath hunting.
Super steep wall dive, lots of white tips underneath, unicornfish, turtles, moray eel.
Not much to see. Longer dive because Claire had a malfunctioning O-ring — started with different group.
Swam straight off the wall into the blue — exhilarating and terrifying — hunting for barracuda and hammerheads. White tip reef sharks and turtles on return.

Divemaster Simon worked the group hard in strong current. 10-15 sharks (white and black tips), all sorts of barracuda. Simon literally hugged the group after — so happy the air consumption held for 60+ mins.
First 20 mins swimming into the blue looking for hammerheads. Lots of tiny jellyfish and strange banana-shaped flat jellies. Healthy top reef with endless fish.
Macro dive. Some eels, turtles, barracuda. Headache at end of dive.
Best dive of Red Sea. Buoyancy obstacle course
2-4m swells at top. Very cool wall
Finished with buddy Farhd who wanted to hit 60 min
Awesome! Hammerhead circled back to check us out
Chaotic. Group split in current. 6/8 divers pulled away
Good cardio, dull. Couldn't find hammerheads
Terrible vis looking for dugongs. Cool flounder video
Snapper followed for 1/3 of dive. Cool coral
Grouper hung out 20 min. Cool coral
Best night dive ever. String of pearls
Dad had regulator issues. Sharks attacked bucket
Dropped to max depth at 35th minute
Steep wall. Reminiscent of Red Sea
Wall dive, sloping sand bottom. Last dive of trip
